arts.ttl: Baines reflects on 'unique day' as Everton interim manager
arts.sum: Leighton Baines reflects on a "unique day" after his first game as interim manager for Everton in their 2-0 victory over Peterborough United in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: Everton overcome Peterborough after Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Premier League strugglers Everton began their post-Sean Dyche era with victory over League One Peterborough in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: David Moyes can be left in no doubt about tough job he's walking into on return to Everton
arts.sum: EVERTON 2-0 PETERBOROUGH: On the day that Everton sacked Sean Dyche and moved to the brink of appointing David Moyes, their problems were there for all to see

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche talk masked big Everton talking point that new boss must now consider
arts.sum: Everton on whistle analysis after the FA Cup clash against Peterborough at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Everton show why change was needed in FA Cup win as life after Sean Dyche begins
arts.sum: Everton 2-0 Peterborough: Just hours after the sacking of Sean Dyche, interim coaches Leighton Baines and Seamus Coleman led the hosts into the fourth-round despite another uninspiring performance

arts.ttl: Everton player ratings as Harrison Armstrong shines but one man poor vs Peterborough
arts.sum: Everton player ratings and scores and the FA Cup clash against Peterborough at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Everton react to Sean Dyche exit with cup win as David Moyes prepares to return
arts.sum: Dyche departed as Toffees boss just hours before the clash with Peterborough at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Armando Broja suffers another unfortunate injury as Everton striker stretchered off against Peterborough
arts.sum: Armando Broja stretchered off while receiving oxygen after unfortunate injury blow vs Peterborough

arts.ttl: Beto slots Everton into 'most welcome' lead against Peterborough
arts.sum: Everton striker gives his side a "most welcome" lead late in the first-half of their FA Cup third round tie against Peterborough United at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: 'Dyche looked a beaten man - now Everton owners face huge decision'
arts.sum: Everton's growing relegations fears saw new owners the Friedkin Group decide they had to sack manager Sean Dyche
